meaning: /adj.鏅鸿兘鍖栫殑//aIz/vt.璧嬩笌鐞嗘櫤,浣跨煡璇嗗寲,浣跨悊鏅哄寲
examples: I tended to mistrust my emotions and intellectualize everything.
But don't over-intellectualize your emotional reaction. Instead, get out of your head and trust your instincts.
The key to this is being able to intellectualize your answers while thinking and at the same time re-processing your answers into colorful sound bites.
